SUMMARY: NESTED | FIELD | CONSTR | METHOD DETAIL: FIELD | CONSTR | METHOD

javax.media.mscontrol.spi
Interface Driver

public interface Driver

The interface that every Media Server Control API driver must implement. Each driver should supply a class that implements the Driver interface.

See Also:
DriverManager, MsControlFactory

Method Summary
 MsControlFactory getFactory(java.util.Properties info)
          Returns a factory configured according to the provided properties.
 PropertyInfo[] getFactoryPropertyInfo()
          Gets information about the supported properties for MsControlFactory instances provided by this driver.
 java.lang.String getName()
          Gets the name of this Driver.
 

Method Detail

getFactory

MsControlFactory getFactory(java.util.Properties info)
                            throws MsControlException
Returns a factory configured according to the provided properties.

Parameters:
info - properties containing implementation specific key-value pairs, see also MEDIA_SERVER_URI
Returns:
factory configured according to the provided properties
Throws:
MsControlException - If invalid properties are provided in the info argument, or if required properties are missing

getName

java.lang.String getName()
Gets the name of this Driver.

Returns:
the name of this Driver

getFactoryPropertyInfo

PropertyInfo[] getFactoryPropertyInfo()
Gets information about the supported properties for MsControlFactory instances provided by this driver. The getFactoryPropertyInfo method is intended to allow a generic GUI tool to discover what properties it should prompt a human for in order to get enough information to configure a MsControlFactory of a specific driver.

Returns:
an array of PropertyInfo objects describing supported properties
